name: pdm-node-backend
description: Backend Node.js + TypeScript para Dinneer API

scripts.test:e2e:usuario: node -e "process.platform === 'win32' ? require('child_process').execSync('npm run test:e2e:usuario:win', {stdio: 'inherit'}) : require('child_process').execSync('npm run test:e2e:usuario:unix', {stdio: 'inherit'})"
scripts.test:e2e:local: node -e "process.platform === 'win32' ? require('child_process').execSync('npm run test:e2e:local:win', {stdio: 'inherit'}) : require('child_process').execSync('npm run test:e2e:local:unix', {stdio: 'inherit'})"
scripts.test:e2e:cardapio: node -e "process.platform === 'win32' ? require('child_process').execSync('npm run test:e2e:cardapio:win', {stdio: 'inherit'}) : require('child_process').execSync('npm run test:e2e:cardapio:unix', {stdio: 'inherit'})"
scripts.test:e2e:encontro: node -e "process.platform === 'win32' ? require('child_process').execSync('npm run test:e2e:encontro:win', {stdio: 'inherit'}) : require('child_process').execSync('npm run test:e2e:encontro:unix', {stdio: 'inherit'})"
scripts.test:e2e:avaliacao: node -e "process.platform === 'win32' ? require('child_process').execSync('npm run test:e2e:avaliacao:win', {stdio: 'inherit'}) : require('child_process').execSync('npm run test:e2e:avaliacao:unix', {stdio: 'inherit'})"
scripts.test:e2e:imagem: node -e "process.platform === 'win32' ? require('child_process').execSync('npm run test:e2e:imagem:win', {stdio: 'inherit'}) : require('child_process').execSync('npm run test:e2e:imagem:unix', {stdio: 'inherit'})"
scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:e2e:usuario && npm run test:e2e:local && npm run test:e2e:cardapio && npm run test:e2e:encontro && npm run test:e2e:avaliacao && npm run test:e2e:imagem
